display.purpose: Hero headlines and section openers. Max one per page.

headline.purpose: Section titles, page H1s on internal routes.

title.purpose: Card titles, FAQ questions, package names.

body.purpose: Paragraph copy. Cap at 65-75ch line length. Never below 16px.

editorial.purpose: One emotional accent per page maximum. Reflective sentences, pull quotes.

label.purpose: Form labels, badges, price-note kickers, section eyebrows.

mono.purpose: Code-adjacent UI only. 404 page, code blocks, demo annotations.

shadows.name: ember-emphasis-glow
shadows.purpose: The system's only shadow. Reserved for the featured pricing card. Signals the recommended package.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for content reveals and the build-hero stagger. Exponential ease-out, no bounce.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Theme-toggle view transition. Symmetric in/out for the circular reveal.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover state shifts (color, border, transform). Always paired with reduced-motion skip.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill-shaped, navy fill, ice text. Used for the single primary CTA on any view (form submit, hero CTA, featured-card action).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; background: #0E1A2B; color: #EEF2F6; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #EEF2F6, 0 0 0 4px #FF5E47; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Pill-shaped, transparent fill with 1px hairline border. Sits next to the Primary Button as the alternative CTA (Cal.com, View work, Read more).
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; background: transparent; color: #0E1A2B; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(14, 26, 43, 0.1); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #EEF2F6, 0 0 0 4px #FF5E47; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Pill-shaped, no border, transparent fill. Used in dense UI where a Secondary would feel too heavy (nav row, table actions, filter strips).
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; background: transparent; color: #0E1A2B; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #EEF2F6, 0 0 0 4px #FF5E47; }

components.name: Default Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped metadata label. Uppercase tracked 12px Space Grotesk. Category tags, status flags.
components.css: .ds-badge-default { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; background: #ffffff; color: #5C6B7E; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(14, 26, 43, 0.1); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Accent Badge
components.description: The coral variant. Subject to The One Ember Rule, use only to mark 'featured' / 'recommended' / 'new'.
components.css: .ds-badge-accent { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; background: rgba(255, 94, 71, 0.1); color: #FF5E47; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 94, 71, 0.3); border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard text input with above-field label. 40px height matches Medium button. Focus shifts border to Ember Coral with a 1px ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; max-width: 320px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #5C6B7E; } .ds-required { color: #FF5E47; margin-left: 4px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 8px 12px; background: #ffffff; color: #0E1A2B; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(14, 26, 43, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5C6B7E; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #FF5E47; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #FF5E47; }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Compact link card with coral icon top-left, arrow top-right, title and one-paragraph summary. The hover state (translate + border-color + arrow-color) is the system's defining tactile moment.
components.html:
Web Design

Modern, mobile-first sites that look great and load fast. Built around what your customers actually need to do.
components.css: .ds-service-card { display: block; padding: 24px; background: #ffffff; color: #0E1A2B; text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid rgba(14, 26, 43, 0.1); border-radius: 12px; transition: border-color 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: rgba(255, 94, 71, 0.4); } .ds-service-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-service-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; color: #FF5E47; } .ds-service-arrow { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: #5C6B7E; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-service-card:hover .ds-service-arrow { color: #0E1A2B; } .ds-service-title { margin: 24px 0 0; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-service-summary { margin: 8px 0 0; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: #5C6B7E; }

components.name: Featured Pricing Card
components.description: The single most visually emphatic surface in the system. 2px Ember Coral border + Ember Emphasis Glow shadow + coral price-note kicker label. Hosts the recommended package in any pricing layout.
components.html:
Most Popular
$2,400

A polished marketing site with everything a growing local business needs to look credible and book work.

  • Custom 5-page site
  • Mobile-first, fast-loading
  • Booking + contact forms
components.css: .ds-pricing-featured { display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 32px; background: #ffffff; color: #0E1A2B; border: 2px solid #FF5E47; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgba(255, 94, 71, 0.18); max-width: 320px; font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-pricing-kicker { margin-bottom: 8px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #FF5E47; } .ds-pricing-amount { font-size: 32px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.015em; line-height: 1; } .ds-pricing-desc { margin: 8px 0 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.6; color: #5C6B7E; } .ds-pricing-features { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 24px 0 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; flex: 1; } .ds-pricing-features li { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-pricing-features svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; margin-top: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-pricing-cta { margin-top: 32px; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 20px; background: #0E1A2B; color: #EEF2F6; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; } .ds-pricing-cta:hover { opacity: 0.9; } .ds-pricing-cta:active { transform: scale(0.98); }

components.name: Sticky Nav
components.description: 64px sticky top nav with blurred Ice Surface background, hairline bottom border, Lume lens-mark logo on the left, link row + theme toggle on the right.
components.html:
Lume·Studio
ServicesWorkPricingAboutContact
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 40; width: 100%; background: rgba(238, 242, 246, 0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(14, 26, 43, 0.1); font-family: 'Space Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; color: #0E1A2B; text-decoration: none; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-logo svg { width: 28px; height: 28px; flex-shrink: 0; transition: transform 300ms ease; } .ds-nav-logo:hover svg { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-nav-dot { opacity: 0.3; margin: 0 2px; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; } .ds-nav-links a { color: #5C6B7E; text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #0E1A2B; }

narrative.overview: Lume Studio's interface is a workshop with the windows open. Ice-blue surfaces stand in for natural daylight on a clean bench; midnight navy is the honest structural frame; ember coral is the one warm tool placed on the surface that draws the eye. The system is meant to feel like work happening in good light — visible, unhurried, accurately measured. The voice is warm, plainspoken, crafted. Generous whitespace that feels confident, not empty; rounded geometry that softens the navy/coral pairing; one accent used sparingly enough that its appearance feels intentional every time. The system rejects four families explicitly: Wix/Squarespace template visuals, crypto/AI startup gradient-and-glow, big-agency austere coldness, and generic SaaS landing pastiche. When in doubt, the system errs toward quieter — restraint signals skill.
keyCharacteristics: Two-color palette: navy structure + coral signal, separated by ice/paper neutrals.
Pill buttons, soft-radius cards, full-radius badges — all geometry rounded.
Flat by default; the only shadow in the system is a soft ember glow under the featured pricing card.
Display sans (Space Grotesk) paired with editorial serif italic (Instrument Serif) for the rare emotional accent.
Mono (JetBrains Mono) appears only as a craft signal — code-adjacent UI, the 404 page, micro-labels.
Theme-aware: same palette, inverted polarity; navy becomes the daylight in dark mode.

rules.name: The One Ember Rule
rules.body: Ember Coral covers ≤10% of any rendered screen. Its rarity is the entire point — every appearance carries weight. If a screen needs two coral elements competing for attention, downgrade one to navy.

rules.name: The No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: #ffffff appears as a value in code only on the Surface Paper token. Backgrounds, hero panels, and full-bleed sections use Ice Surface (#EEF2F6) so the page reads as cool daylight, not a printer's blank sheet.

rules.name: The Tinted-Hairline Rule
rules.body: Borders are navy-with-alpha (light mode) or ice-with-alpha (dark mode), never neutral grey. Even the dividers are part of the palette.

rules.name: The One-Serif-Per-Page Rule
rules.body: Instrument Serif italic carries emotional weight precisely because it is rare. Two italic serif lines in the same view dilute both.

rules.name: The Uppercase-Only-For-Labels Rule
rules.body: Uppercase + 0.06em tracking belongs to labels, badges, and price-note kickers. Headlines are never uppercased.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: New surfaces are flat. If a component reads as needing elevation, the answer is almost always (a) increase whitespace, (b) shift surface color, or (c) add a hairline border — in that order. A shadow is the last resort.

rules.name: The One-Shadow Rule
rules.body: The ember-tinted glow under the featured pricing card is the system's only shadow. If you find yourself adding a second shadow anywhere, stop.

dos: Do use Midnight Navy (#0E1A2B) as the structural color for body text, primary buttons, and the logo. It is the system's beam.
Do reserve Ember Coral (#FF5E47) for ≤10% of any screen — focus rings, CTAs that aren't carried by navy, the featured pricing card's border + glow, the service card icon. Its rarity is its meaning.
Do use Ice Surface (#EEF2F6) for the page background. The cool tint is what separates Lume from a default-CSS site.
Do keep cards flat with a 1px Hairline border. The one exception — the featured pricing card — earns its emphasis because nothing else has it.
Do use pill-shaped buttons at every size. The softness is intentional warmth against the otherwise restrained palette.
Do size body text at 1rem (16px) or larger. Primary buyers skew 40+; small body type costs conversions, not just a11y points.
Do use Instrument Serif italic for one emotional accent per page, maximum.
Do keep nav, footer, forms, and content copy at WCAG 2.1 AA contrast. Best-effort applies to interactive demos only, never to text.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion on every animation. Animations skip to final state, they do not just slow down.
donts: Don't use #ffffff as a background color. Surface Paper is for cards and inputs only; backgrounds are Ice Surface. The system has a temperature; pure white breaks it.
Don't stack the Wix/Squarespace/GoDaddy template visual: stock-photo hero, three-icon services row, identical feature cards, 'Welcome to Our Company' headline.
Don't introduce crypto/AI startup energy: dark gradient hero, neon accents, glassmorphism, mesh backgrounds, 'launching soon' energy.
Don't lean big-agency austere: tiny type, all-caps headlines, gallery-wall portfolio, no prices visible. Buyers feel they can't afford to ask and bounce.
Don't copy the generic SaaS landing pastiche: gradient-number hero, feature-grid with soft shadows, 'trusted by' logo wall, dark-mode showcase as the headline pattern.
Don't add a second shadow anywhere in the system. The Ember Emphasis Glow under the featured pricing card is the only shadow that exists.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, callouts, or alerts.
Don't apply background-clip: text with a gradient (gradient text). Single solid colors only. Emphasis through weight or size.
Don't nest cards inside cards. If content needs grouping inside a card, use spacing and a hairline divider, not a sub-card.
Don't uppercase headlines. Uppercase belongs to labels, badges, and price-note kickers — the 12px tracked tier.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
Don't introduce a new font family without removing one. Three text families (Space Grotesk, Instrument Serif, JetBrains Mono) is the cap.
Don't expand the palette. If a screen feels like it needs a new color, the answer is whitespace, hierarchy, or one of the existing tokens — not green, not yellow, not a second accent.
